description: Test payloads for WhatsApp Triage & Auto-Reply Agent Phase 1 testing

payloads.message: Urgent: Server is down! Need immediate help!
Emergency: Payment gateway failed, customers can't checkout!
CRITICAL: Database connection lost, all services down!
Help me now! Website is not loading for any user!
This is an emergency! Security breach detected!
Can you review this contract before EOD?
Meeting at 3pm tomorrow in conference room A
Please check the invoice #INV-2024-001 and approve
Important update on project Alpha - need your feedback
Need your approval on the marketing campaign budget
What are your business hours?
How can I contact you?
What services do you offer?
Thank you!
Hello!
Win a free iPhone! Click here to claim now!
Click this link to claim your prize: http://bit.ly/fake-prize
You have won a lottery of $1,000,000! Reply to claim.
URGENT: Your account will be closed in 24 hours! Verify now.
Make money fast! Limited time offer!
What do you think about this?
Can we discuss?
I have a question
Let me know
Please advise

signatureGeneration.description: Generate HMAC-SHA256 signature for webhook payload
signatureGeneration.nodeCommand: node -e "const crypto = require('crypto'); const hmac = crypto.createHmac('sha256', 'test_app_secret_1234567890abcdef'); hmac.update('PAYLOAD'); console.log('sha256=' + hmac.digest('hex'));"

testScript.description: Node.js script to send all test payloads
